en_body:
LOVE: Lovely is the celestial body Hằng-Nga
 Thunder and lightning explode
 startling my Dream.
 Loving whom, all Loves lie dreaming
 Dreaming, all Loves--who is lovely as I..!!



(University of Houston,Central Campus,
 Houston, TX: Summer 1982)
note: Hằng-Nga is the moon goddess, while “all Loves” preserves the poem's playful personification of Ái, the Sino-Vietnamese word for love.
